generation.answer: HDFC Equity Fund is a large-cap equity scheme that invests primarily in large-cap companies with a focus on long-term capital appreciation. It follows a growth-oriented investment style and aims to generate returns by investing in a diversified portfolio of large-cap stocks. See the official website for more information: https://www.hdfcfund.com
